---
title: "Appendices"
---

# Appendices

These appendices collect quick-reference materials for NREC4107. Use them while studying, coding, preparing for exams, or completing the empirical project.

| Appendix | Purpose | When to use |
|---|---|---|
| [A. Formula Sheet](appendix-a-formula-sheet.qmd) | Key formulas and interpretation rules | Reviewing before quizzes, exams, and regression work |
| [B. Python Code Guide](appendix-b-python-code-guide.qmd) | Copy-paste Python patterns for common tasks | Working in Colab or debugging project code |
| [C. Exam Practice](appendix-c-exam-practice.qmd) | Practice questions with a short answer key | Preparing for exams without using official exam material |
| [D. Project Checklist](appendix-d-project-checklist.qmd) | Empirical project quality checklist | Planning, revising, and submitting the final project |
| [E. Dataset Integrity](appendix-e-dataset-integrity.qmd) | Dataset credibility and cleaning checks | Before analysis and before final submission |
